◆ CHOREOGRAPHER

Five individuals, each on screen once. Click a person in the bottom row to select them — then set their own direction / speed / scale / position, and build their walk cycle by clicking the good frames from across their sheets (this is where we drop the third leg, the stalls, and any head-turn). I flagged nothing by sight (my viewer's down) — you're the eyes.
STAGE
zoom 1.00×
focus x 480
focus y 270
Ground y & bg cover are shared framing; everything else is per-person below.
SELECTED: A
direction
speed 42
scale 1.35×
depth (feet y) 470
start pos 0.20
anim fps 9
live cycle preview
current cycle (click a frame below to add · click here to remove) —
all frames from this person's sheets — click to add to the cycle in order:
CAST — click to select (dim = not in scene)
